case_title: PATEL, NAVNIT G. vs. BLACKWELL, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT G. AS TO DEFENDANT BLACKWELL, ROBERT
